|desc={{p|Whirlipede}} is Roxie's only known Pokémon. It was sent out to assist Roxie in finding the villains who attacked a man and stole his {{p|Karrablast}}. At the [[Castelia Sewers]], Whirlipede was used to battle the {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s' {{p|Muk}}. Due to being a Poison-type expert, Roxie managed to hold her own in battle, but was eventually overwhelmed by the number of opponents.

None of Whirlipede's moves are known.}}
